title: Complex Creamy Mexican Speck Birria
description: A rich and flavorful Oaxacan-inspired dish featuring speck, infused oil, and a variety of herbs, served in a bento box, this jain-friendly meal is perfect for a solo dinner

ingredients.name: infused oil
ingredients.notes: made with herbs like thyme and rosemary

instructions: Heat the infused oil in a large saucepan over medium heat
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the diced tomato and cook until they start to break down, about 5 minutes
Add the guajillo chili and cook for 1 minute
Add the vegetable broth and bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes
Add the speck and cook until heated through, about 2 minutes
Stir in the crema and cook until the mixture is creamy and heated through
Season with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the birria in a bento box, garnished with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice
